content:
I'd like to share my progress on this project so far, to field opinions on the structure of it.

Yes, cutting the source sheet is resulting in a whole bunch of files, but they're getting neatly organized so I hope it's not too confusing!
I'm starting with the "Story" sheet, and folding in to each file the relevant pieces from other sheets, like Stage Names & Descriptions.

So far I only have Daffodil, Sorel, Lily Special Ops, and Ogier Deepdive neatly organized, and none of the files have any of the previously compiled progress from other volunteers yet, so **this is just a showing, please don't download or work on any of these files yet.**
https://github.com/omnichromia/morimens-volunteer-coordination
